displayTitle: Boba Fett: Death, Lies, and Treachery
synopsis: Boba Fett pursues an intergalactic magician who may hold the key to the Hutts' future. The fact that the magician has died only poses a slight problem for the bounty hunter… not even the dead can escape Boba Fett!
title: Boba Fett: Death, Lies, and Treachery
